overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a foggy, dark urban street at night. The player approaches a building with bright red neon signage reading 'MR. DOOR' and other text, passing abandoned vehicles and scaffolding. The atmosphere is horror-themed with hazy visibility and neon-lit environments.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, dark urban street at night. An abandoned white sedan is parked on the left while the camera moves forward toward a large trailer blocking the path ahead. Yellow street lamps glow faintly through the haze, and red neon signage becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with scaffolding and neon signage

events.description: moving from open street to covered building entrance area
entering area illuminated by bright red neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking under the building canopy past scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: red neon sign with 'NCR' text visible on the left side
building entrance with large columns and overhead canopy
metal scaffolding structure along the right side of the walkway
wall covered in white and red graffiti tags
large red neon sign reading 'MR. DOOR' visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open street into a covered building entrance area. Scaffolding lines the right side next to graffiti-covered walls, while red neon signs including 'NCR' and the distant 'MR. DOOR' sign illuminate the foggy atmosphere. The ground is covered with leaves and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: building facade with large vertical neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the large neon sign overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching the corner of the building and looking up at the large neon signage

entered.detail: red neon sign with 'RETURN' text on the left side of the building
building facade with large glass windows and stone columns

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the building facade beneath massive red neon signs reading 'MR. DOOR' and 'RETURN'. The scaffolding now appears on the left as the camera approaches the corner of the building. Toward the end, the camera tilts upward to admire the large curved neon sign overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a desolate, foggy street into the oppressive glow of a neon-lit building entrance. It begins on a dark urban road, passing an abandoned white sedan and moving toward a large trailer that blocks the path under the faint glow of yellow street lamps. As the camera pushes forward, the open street transitions into a covered entrance area where graffiti-covered walls and scaffolding emerge from the haze, illuminated by red neon signs. The scene then shifts along the building's facade, passing beneath massive red signs reading MR. DOOR and RETURN while the scaffolding moves to the left. Finally, the camera reaches the corner of the structure and tilts upward to reveal the scale of the large, curved neon signage overhead.
